title: 雲のかたち、故郷のみんな

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is standing on the academy rooftop,
gazing into the distance.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
choice_data_list: What are you doing up here?
What are you doing up here?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking about my hometown. I wonder
how everyone is doing...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmm... That cloud kind of looks like Shige.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: And that one reminds me of Tome. And that one over there... meat stew... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap doesn't seem like herself today. I guess
she's homesick.
